docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY MISRA, JAY AS TO DEFENDANT BILLINGSLEY, LOURDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
